productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Solid Pink Track Pants
description: CompositionPink track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with flattened seams, broad elasticated waist that can be folded, reinforced tear points, fitting bands on the legs and printed branding on the left upperFitComfortWash careWash dark colours separately in warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or ironFlat dry in shadeEnjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga pant. Made of a cotton/elastane blend, this pant is stitched with flat seams, has a printed label to prevent irritation, and a soft fabric allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. The broad foldable waist fits snugly, offering ample support to your lower and mid back. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. Team this with urban yoga t-shirts and tops for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 39”, height 5'7” waist 25”, hips 35”
